items.title: Mbappé gives injury scare to Real Madrid, France
items.summary: Real Madrid coach Álvaro Arbeloa said Kylian Mbappé felt "discomfort" before asking to be substituted during Friday's 1-1 draw at Real Betis.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.
